text.title: Grafana Dashboard Design Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the grafana-dashboards methodology.

example.context: Acme Inc. is greenfielding a single GCP organisation for two product lines with shared platform tenancy.
example.inputs: Org charter (2 product lines, 3 environments), regulated workload list (payments), IdP discovery URL.

decisions.decision: Production / Staging / Development plus Shared Infrastructure
Workload Identity Federation for CI; Cloud Identity SSO with MFA for humans
Shared VPC in host project with /16 per environment

example.output-summary: Approved landing-zone spec ready for Terraform module instantiation.
